arg.name: motor_ids
arg.description: list: Dynamixel IDs of the motors you're connecting. Order maps to sensor_ids order.

arg.name: sensor_ids
arg.description: list: IDs of the glove sensors. I use 1 = ring finger, 2 = middle finger, 3 = index finger. Order maps to motor_ids order.

arg.name: control_mode
arg.description: 0, 1: Should the motors start up with torque off or on?

arg.name: plotter
arg.description: (bool) Launch plotjuggler to view motor goal messages?

arg.name: motors
arg.description: (bool) Run motors? If false, only the sensor node will launch

arg.name: sensor_source
arg.description: Read sensors from ADC connected to Raspberry Pi or from an external device connected by serial?

arg.name: serial_port
arg.description: str: Which port is the serial device on?
